generated_exposure.exposure_text: As a former intelligence analyst, I've seen firsthand how critical it is to strengthen our strategic autonomy. The recent cyber attacks on our infrastructure prove we can't rely solely on allies. Investing in domestic capabilities isn't just about security—it's about preserving our sovereignty in an uncertain world. #NationalSecurity #StrategicAutonomy
